title: Yuhan's Ride Config
description: A simple mod to adjust Cobblemon's riding mechanics to your liking!
body:
**Yuhan's Ride Config**

In this mod, you can:

- Broadly adjust Cobblemon's riding stats.
- Individually adjust land, water, and air speed.
- Extend or Reduce land, water, and air stamina.
- Avoid individually configuring every single cobblemon through their json file/etc.
- Easily make these changes both through an in-game GUI and a simple config file.

Includes out of box compatibility with ATMxMSD, Nava's ZA Megas, Horret's Extended Megas, and my personal Mega addons as well!

Currently only supports Neoforge. Untested with Sinatra Connector.

**Usage Guide**: Shift right-click a compass in game in order to open up the in game config menu.

**Bugs and Help**: Currently the stamina toggles are broken, however they will be fixed soon. If you need help with anything else, I have a help channel in the official Cobblemon discord.

Credit: Escobooom
